namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder> DictionaryHolder => __DictionaryHolder ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __DictionaryHolder, __Create_DictionaryHolder());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder>? __DictionaryHolder;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder> __Create_DictionaryHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_DictionaryHolder,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_DictionaryHolder,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[] __CreateProperties_DictionaryHolder() => new global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[]
        {
            new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenPropertyShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder, global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>>
            {
                Position = 0,
                Name = "Lookup",
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder>)DictionaryHolder,
                PropertyType = Dictionary_String_Int32,
                Getter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder obj) => obj.Lookup,
                Setter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder obj, global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int> value) => obj.Lookup = value,
                MemberInfoFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder).GetProperty("Lookup", __BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, typeof(global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>), global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsGetterPublic = true,
                IsSetterPublic = true,
                IsGetterNonNullable = true,
                IsSetterNonNullable = true,
            },
        };

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IConstructorShape __CreateConstructor_DictionaryHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenConstructorShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder, global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.EmptyArgumentState>
            {
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder>)DictionaryHolder,
                DefaultConstructor = static () => new global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder(),
                MethodBaseFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.DictionaryHolder).GetConstructor(__BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsPublic = true,
            };
        }
    }
